violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The 2 door freezer was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. The walk in freezer door was observed in poor repair (Bottom Seal). Equipment must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2025
The floor in the dishwashing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is using dishwasher to wash and rinse. Establishment is to use three bay to sanitize. 3 Bay Quat sanitizer tested at 300ppm. Establishment is to have repair made to dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

The screen door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment must make repair to screen door. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the dishwash area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
